description_long: This is a sleek, modern black laptop with a textured exterior finish and a prominent 'DigDig' logo embossed on the back of the display lid. The laptop features a full-sized QWERTY keyboard with clearly marked keys, a large touchpad centered below the keyboard, and a wide, matte-finished display screen. The chassis appears to be constructed from a combination of plastic and possibly carbon fiber, giving it a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. On the left and right sides of the base, several ports are visible, including USB and possibly HDMI, indicating versatile connectivity. The laptop also has a couple of stickers on the palm rest area, likely denoting hardware specifications or branding.
description: A modern black laptop with a textured finish, 'DigDig' logo on the lid, full QWERTY keyboard, large touchpad, and visible side ports.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile, open screen, and visible left-side ports.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full keyboard, large touchpad, and wide display screen.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right-side ports and the laptop's slim design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the textured lid with the 'DigDig' logo embossed in the center.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'DigDig' logo is embossed in the center of the back of the display lid, featuring raised, bold lettering.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content or illumination.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row and standard key arrangement; no numeric keypad is present.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are present on the right palm rest area, one rectangular and one square, likely indicating hardware specifications.
